positive: A stylish, modern typographic illustration of a majestic, symmetrical mountain range viewed at dawn. The style should be a clean, continuous line art with strong, graphic silhouettes. Use a limited, complementary color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and slate gray. The composition should be centered and highly scalable for apparel. Include subtle, abstract celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized stars, emphasizing clean negative space. The overall aesthetic must be retro-modern, clean, and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on fabric. The background must be transparent or solid white for maximum print versatility.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muted colors, busy background, photorealism, poor composition
